# Synopsis — `99_test-op` (after renumbering)

**Position in lineage:** **Not a code generation** — auxiliary benchmark artifacts  
**Related to:** `04_SWUIFT_CLI_v1` / `05_SWUIFT_CLI_V1.1` (baseline CLI runs)

## What this folder is

Archived **simulation outputs** from baseline CLI runs (timestamps `20260304_162535`, `20260304_163047`), used to compare performance or correctness across builds — not a source tree.

## Contents (per subfolder)

- `frames/` — per-timestep PNGs  
- `simulation.mp4`, `simulation.gif`  
- `fire_prog.csv`, `zvector.csv`  
- `ig_pixel.png`, `ig_structure.png`  
- `run_log.txt`, `run_params.json`

## Optimizations

None — this folder stores run products only.

## Predecessor / successor

N/A in the numbered optimization line. Refer to `04`/`05` for the CLI that produced these outputs.
